Uses of Package
org.apache.bookkeeper.util.collections

Packages that use org.apache.bookkeeper.util.collections
Package
Description
org.apache.bookkeeper.bookie
Provides a Bookie server that stores entries for clients.
org.apache.bookkeeper.util.collections
Bookkeeper collection utilities.

    Description
    ConcurrentLongHashMap
    Map from long to an Object.
    ConcurrentLongLongHashMap
    Concurrent hash map from primitive long to long.

    ConcurrentLongLongHashMap.LongLongPredicate

    Concurrent hash map where both keys and values are composed of pairs of longs.
